title: PCI-DSS annual compliance audit broad read access
compensating_controls: Queries routed through time-limited virtual warehouse AUDIT_WH_TIMELIMITED (auto-suspend after 4 hours); dynamic data masking applied to all PCI fields (card numbers masked as XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-####); CVV and expiration dates fully redacted; all queries logged to immutable audit trail with 24-month retention; access limited to two named auditors: Sandra Lee (Meridian Compliance Group) and Nathan Brooks (Internal Audit)
review_outcome: Active — PCI audit in progress. Masking verified. Auto-suspend confirmed.

title: Risk team access to disaggregated transaction data for fraud model v3
compensating_controls: Access limited to RISK schema only; no PCI table access; transaction data pre-aggregated with no individual cardholder linkage; weekly model output review by CISO
review_outcome: Renewed — no PCI data accessed. Model outputs validated. Extended to 2026-06-05.
